properties.name: Iran — Nationwide Unrest Zone
properties.note: Ongoing civil resistance following Woman Life Freedom uprising. State suppression of dissent. Internet shutdowns deployed during protest surges. Regime-linked executions of activists ongoing.

properties.name: Venezuela — Caracas Metropolitan Unrest
properties.note: Post-election crackdown following disputed July 2024 result. Maduro government suppressing opposition. Arbitrary detentions. Mass emigration. Colectivo paramilitaries active in urban zones.

properties.name: Haiti — Port-au-Prince Gang Control Zone
properties.note: Gang coalition controls ~80% of metropolitan area. Government collapsed. Kenya-led MSS deployed but limited impact. Humanitarian crisis: acute food insecurity, hospital closures, mass displacement.

properties.name: Georgia — Tbilisi Pro-EU Protests
properties.note: Mass protests against Georgian Dream government following disputed Oct 2024 election and EU accession freeze. Water cannon and riot police used repeatedly. EU candidacy suspended.

properties.name: Serbia — Belgrade / Novi Sad Protests
properties.note: Student-led mass protests following Novi Sad railway collapse (Nov 2024). Escalated to nationwide movement demanding government accountability. Largest protests since 2000.

properties.name: Bangladesh — Dhaka Political Flashpoint
properties.note: Post-revolution political tensions following ouster of PM Hasina (Aug 2024). Yunus-led interim government under pressure. Islamist mobilization, minority attacks, political violence documented.

properties.name: Pakistan — PTI Protest Corridor
properties.note: PTI long marches from KPK to Islamabad. Imran Khan imprisoned. Inter-provincial security blockades. Internet throttling during demonstrations. Military-political tensions elevated.

properties.name: Nigeria — Southwest Protest Zone
properties.note: Cost-of-living protests following subsidy removal. August 2024 nationwide protests against Tinubu government. Security forces used lethal force. Labour strikes ongoing. Lagos and Abuja key flashpoints.

properties.name: Russia — Internal Dissent Zone (Moscow / St. Petersburg)
properties.note: Suppressed anti-war and political dissent. Navalny killed Feb 2024. OVD-Info: 19,000+ arrested since 2022 invasion. Any protest activity aggressively policed. Primarily below surface — draft evasion, emigration, underground organizing.

properties.name: Hong Kong — Restricted Civic Space
properties.note: Post-NSL suppression. All major pro-democracy organizations disbanded. Public assembly permits routinely denied. 47 opposition leaders convicted under NSL. Diaspora activism continues offshore.

properties.name: Cuba — Havana Protest Zone
properties.note: July 11 2021 historic nationwide protests: largest since 1959. Subsequent protests March 2024 and September 2024 amid fuel and food shortages. Internet shut down during each surge. Security forces responded with live ammunition and mass detentions. Hundreds imprisoned including minors.
properties.source: ACLED / Human Rights Watch / Amnesty International

properties.name: Ethiopia — Amhara / Oromia Civil Unrest
properties.note: Amhara region erupted in full armed conflict 2023 as Fano militia fought federal forces. Oromia ongoing OLA insurgency. Mass displacements. State of emergency declared multiple times. Internet shutdowns and journalist arrests documented. Several hundred killed in Amhara crackdown.
properties.source: ACLED / Human Rights Watch / Ethiopia Human Rights Commission
